plan.failureSummary: The deterministic cached run tried to click 'Select your occupation' combobox, which was missing on the page. Instead, the page rendered the 'Age Group' radio buttons.
observedIndicators: dynamic layout mismatch between cached step and live page (Age Group vs Occupation)
historical flakiness with alternating SUCCESS/FAILED runs

remediationSteps.summary: Clear PageAI cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the PageAI cache and trigger a retry of the test. This forces the PageAI agent to re-analyze the live page structure and adapt to the 'Age Group' field instead of using stale cached selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable PageAI caching/deterministic mode for this unstable test
remediationSteps.details: If this application dynamically alternates layouts on every load, deterministic cached mode is unsuitable. Consider disabling deterministic cache mode for this specific test so that PageAI always runs dynamically.

plan.notes: The 'unstable-survey' test application has a dynamic layout that alternates form fields (e.g., swapping 'Age Group' and 'Occupation' fields). Because the test ran in DETERMINISTIC mode, it attempted to play back cached steps containing the 'Select your occupation' selector, which does not exist in the current layout set. Clearing the PageAI cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to dynamically adapt to the current fields.
